---
title: q.feature Roadmap
---

Only open work is listed here. Completed items are removed.

## Planned

- [ ] Persist feature-definition metadata alongside materialized tables
- [ ] Dependency graphs between derived features
- [ ] Incremental computation from the latest materialized timestamp
- [ ] Point-in-time joins and explicit availability delays
- [ ] Batch/online equivalence tests and replay fixtures
- [ ] Feature-set fingerprints and lineage
- [ ] Database upsert and partition policies
